character.name:
Mechanical sentinel guardian boss, isometric pixel art, gothic sci-fi. 
Large floating mechanical construct. Spherical main body hovering above 
a heavy base, surrounded by 6 rotating armored plates orbiting it. 
Single large cyan glowing eye #00ffcc at center. Metal plating dark 
gunmetal grey #1a1a2a with cyan energy lines. Industrial, imposing, 
otherworldly. Massive silhouette. Crisp pixel art, dark background, 
transparent if possible.
